tests.message: No HTML syntax errors found. Document structure is valid.
No CSS syntax errors found. All styles are valid.
CSS variable --bg-body is set to #0f172a and applied to body element.
Sidebar contains 5 nav links: Dashboard (active), Analytics, Users, Settings, Logout.
CSS variable --sidebar-width is set to 220px and applied to aside.sidebar.
Header.topbar contains input.search-input with placeholder 'Search...'.
div.notification-bell contains SVG bell icon and span.badge with text '3'. Badge has red background (#ef4444).
div.avatar contains text 'JD'.
Four kpi-card elements present with IDs kpi-users, kpi-revenue, kpi-sessions, kpi-bounce.
Users: data-target=24512, +12% | Revenue: data-target=48320, +8.3% | Sessions: data-target=1847, -3.2% | Bounce: data-target=24.8, -5.1%
app.js animates KPI values from 0 to target using requestAnimationFrame with 2-second duration and cubic ease-out.
Section with class 'bar-chart' and div#bar-chart exists. JS builds 6 bars with revenue data.
Bar data: Jan=5.2k, Feb=6.1k, Mar=7.8k, Apr=6.9k, May=8.3k, Jun=9.1k
Bars start at height 0px and transition to target height with staggered delays (100ms + index*100ms).
Section with class 'donut-chart' and div#donut-chart exists. JS builds SVG donut chart.
Donut segments: Organic 42%, Direct 28%, Referral 18%, Social 12%
SVG circles animate stroke-dashoffset with staggered delays (300ms + index*150ms).
JS populates table with 5 user rows containing name, email, role, status badge, and last login.
input#user-search has 'input' event listener that filters rows by name or email.
JS populates .feed-list with 5 timeline items containing timestamps and text.
CSS .feed-item has border-left: 2px solid var(--bg-hover) and ::before pseudo-element with blue circle.
No hero, testimonials, or pricing sections found in index.html.
No testimonials section found in index.html.
No pricing section found in index.html.
Script tag <script src='app.js'></script> present at end of body. JS wrapped in DOMContentLoaded.
No obvious syntax errors in app.js. All braces, parentheses, and semicolons appear balanced.
Badge has position:absolute, background:var(--accent-red) (#ef4444), border-radius:50%, width/height:18px, font-size:11px.
CSS includes @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule that disables animations and transitions.
CSS includes :focus-visible rule with 3px solid outline and 2px offset.
div.notification-bell has aria-label='Notifications' and SVG has aria-hidden='true'.
CSS includes responsive breakpoints at 1024px (2-column KPI grid) and 768px (1-column KPI grid, hidden sidebar).
Uses aside, nav, header, main, section semantic elements.
Screenshot confirms: dark theme, sidebar, topbar, KPI cards, bar chart, donut chart, users table, and activity feed are all visible and properly laid out.
